warlord who remembers sieges erased from every history book now written
immortal scholar mourning a mortal son dead four hundred years ago
corporate patriarch who has outlived seven multinational empires he founded himself
feral thing haunting abandoned cathedral crypts speaking no human language anymore
exiled prince from a kingdom cartographers deleted from all surviving maps
vampire-sorcerer bending shadow and moonlight like woven fabric between fingers
cursed monk who begged refusal when this transformation was forced upon him
art dealer discreetly purchasing his own portraits across four consecutive centuries
storm-chaser vanishing into arctic blizzards for years then reappearing without explanation
seer reading collapsed futures in arranged bones and calculated perfect silence
the oldest constant presence in any room and profoundly utterly alone
silent figure appearing in the corner of gatherings across three hundred years
nobleman who personally buried every mortal friend he ever loved across five centuries
former priest hollowed out by immortality into something that barely remembers faith
alchemist obsessively searching for the cure he knows he'll never actually use
freshly turned and violently furious about what was stolen from him
architect who redesigns the same crumbling estate every thirty years under new names
keeper of forbidden manuscripts written in languages that predate recorded civilization
count who watched his entire bloodline collapse from the same stone tower
wild thing that hasn't spoken a coherent word to humans in decades
the one even other vampires cross the street to avoid approaching
surgeon who chose this existence to continue research no ethics board would permit
wanderer who has walked every road in Europe carrying nothing but memory
collector of swords from wars no living historian can verify ever happened
turned himself to save someone who has now forgotten he ever existed
